What I do

I audit real workflows, prove the ROI, then build the AI agents and automations that take the manual work off the table.

My Direction

0.1

My Mission

I map what's actually costing time and money before I touch a single tool. Then I build agents that remove the grind — not just move it somewhere else.

0.2

My Vision

Good automation is invisible. It runs in the background and the people it serves stop thinking about it — they just get their time back.

0.3

My Ambition

Most AI integrations break the moment a third tool gets added. I want to build systems that people are still running two years later.
